name: Shell
description: Execute commands in the active platform shell. Uses Bash-compatible shell commands on Linux/macOS and PowerShell commands on Windows.

executeCommand.description: Execute a command in the active platform shell and return the result.

timeout.description: Command timeout. Use seconds by default. Large legacy values such as 30000 or 60000 are interpreted as milliseconds unless timeoutUnit is provided.

timeoutUnit.description: Explicit unit for timeout. Use seconds for intentionally long tasks.

timeoutRetries.description: Number of timeout-only retries. Each retry doubles the previous timeout. Defaults to 2 and is capped internally.
